# Third-party browser assets

These files are vendored so the AstrBot Plugin Page does not require a runtime
CDN connection. They were taken from the corresponding npm release archives
without source modification.

## markdown-it 14.3.0

- Project: <https://github.com/markdown-it/markdown-it>
- File: `markdown-it/markdown-it.min.js`
- License: MIT; see `markdown-it/LICENSE`
- npm integrity: `sha512-RCEsPjR+sr0x+AuYp601tKTkgFG4YEPLCzHST3cQ/fhlJkqAkz1L2/Qbp1j9qw5SBwQHFBoW8+hoN5xssOF0Tw==`

## DOMPurify 3.4.12

- Project: <https://github.com/cure53/DOMPurify>
- File: `dompurify/purify.min.js`
- License: Apache-2.0 OR MPL-2.0; see `dompurify/LICENSE-APACHE-2.0`
  and `dompurify/LICENSE-MPL-2.0`
- npm integrity: `sha512-zQvGet8Z2sWbQhCmfFz/T5QWH2oBmjnqK3qvOjaqaNLrLEF912WamU+ohnTp0TCep/MFVHpdJuCZEdFOdTnEFg==`
